author: jakubgs
content:
Hey hey, who do I talk to about an issue with Hoodi Launchpad not allowing me to exit a validator?

I created a validator just to test how partial deposits work, and it's registered now(not running it tho):
https://hoodi.beaconcha.in/validator/0xb0c17ca23cece45c98c6731a8f823200027a7ad8089cfa396b90a3ee01cd81fbc9340de1e71a4e7bd0ab2aa3956fc346#deposits

That was almost 3 days ago, but I still am unable to exit it using launchpad:
https://hoodi.launchpad.ethereum.org/en/validator-actions

Can't tell if it's a Launchpad bug or partial deposit validators are somehow different and just take longer to appear there.
And yes, I verified the withdrawal address I'm using is correct.

author: pk910
content:
something is bad on the launchpad :/
I can see the underlying call to the beaconcha.in api fails with a missing authentication

author: butta
content: we recently added the requirement of an api key, so that'd make sense

author: carlbeek
content:
Thanks for raising, will look into it!

In the meanwhile if you need to exit, give the EthStaker interface a try: https://hoodi.console.ethstaker.org/
